channel.title: Enterprise on Gouri Shankar Swamy
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise on Gouri Shankar Swamy

item.title: Agents Are Ready. Is Your Data?
item.description: Enterprise data must transform to support AI agents, not just AI tools.

item.title: Right-Sizing Intelligence: From Cloudonomics to Tokenomics
item.description: The economics of AI are shifting — understanding tokenomics is the new capacity planning.

item.title: Dreamer's Paradise: AI from Imagination to Execution
item.description: The journey from AI imagination to real-world execution — bridging the gap between what we dream and what we ship.
